summary: Session 14 testing complete. ALL FEATURES PASSED: (1) Jest pipeline tests 110/110 passing (+11 vercel-bundler tests, +10 supabase-wiring tests), (2) Vercel-ready ZIP export returns file_count > 9, deployable: true, includes all scaffold files (package.json, vite.config.js, index.html, src/main.jsx, src/index.css, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js, README.md, .gitignore), (3) Supabase-aware export includes @supabase/supabase-js dep, .env.local.example, README mentions Supabase, supabaseClient.jsx uses import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL, (4) Backend config modal opens on non-core projects, form has data-testid inputs, PATCH saves settings.supabase, button flips to 'Supabase ✓', (5) Chat placeholder swaps: fresh chat shows 'Describe what you want to build...', existing chat shows 'Ask me to add a feature, change styles, or fix something — I'll edit the code.', (6) Stats endpoints working: /api/stats/build-times returns P50/P95/archetype_stats, /api/stats/my-builds returns 401 unauthenticated and correct shape when authenticated, (7) Dashboard loads with MyBuildsWidget showing build stats.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Jest suite 110/110 tests passing across 8 test files
PASS: Vercel-ready ZIP export produces deployable package with all scaffold files
PASS: package.json is valid JSON with react, react-dom, vite, tailwindcss deps
PASS: Generated JSX files have React imports auto-injected
PASS: Supabase-aware export includes @supabase/supabase-js when project has supabase config
PASS: .env.local.example emitted with VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
PASS: supabaseClient.jsx uses import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL in exported code
PASS: Backend config modal opens with data-testid='backend-config-modal'
PASS: Form inputs have data-testid='backend-supabase-url' and data-testid='backend-supabase-key'
PASS: PATCH /api/projects/{id} saves settings.supabase with url, anonKey, configuredAt
PASS: Backend button shows 'Supabase ✓' with emerald styling after save
PASS: Chat placeholder swaps based on messages.length
PASS: /api/stats/my-builds returns 401 unauthenticated, correct shape when authenticated
PASS: Dashboard loads with MyBuildsWidget showing 6 builds this week, 35s fastest
updated_files: /app/lib/supabase/db.js - Added db.exports module for export record persistence
/app/lib/api/routes/projects.js - Added PATCH method support alongside PUT
/app/lib/api/routes/exports.js - Made export record creation resilient to missing table
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 14 features complete. Vercel-ready ZIP export working with all scaffold files. Supabase opt-in via BackendConfigModal saves to project.settings.supabase and affects subsequent exports. Chat placeholder swaps based on message count. Jest suite at 110/110 tests. Minor fixes applied: added db.exports module, added PATCH support for projects, made export record creation resilient.

/api/stats/build-times.shape: { total_builds, p50_seconds, p95_seconds, fastest_seconds, archetype_counts, archetype_stats }

chat_placeholder_swap.fresh_chat_placeholder: Describe what you want to build...
